title: Guasslee 36 Inch Giant Latex Balloons, 10 Pack Assorted Colours Balloons Reusable for Wedding Birthday Party Baby Showers Graduation Decorations
features: Packaging Includes: 10 pack colourful 36 inch big balloons, colours include: white black red green blue pink purple yellow orange gold. Colours may vary due to different batch of balloons

Premium Quality Balloons: These multicoloured balloons are made of high quality durable latex material, colour uniform, heavy duty and with no smell. You don't have to worry about them tearing or bursting when inflated

Widely Used: These assorted colour large balloons are great decorations for all kinds of parties and festivals, such as your birthday, baby shower, graduation party, anniversary, wedding, Valentine's Day, Halloween, Christmas and New Year's Eve, outdoor decoration etc

Giant Balloons: All large balloons have inflated diameter about 36 inch. These rainbow balloons can be hung up with ribbons after being filled with air or helium, making your party stand out from other ordinary parties
Reliable Support: We appreciate your trust, if there is any problem with our jumbo balloons, please reach out to our customer service, we will treat it sincerely

Warm Tips: Please inflate balloons to recommended size to avoid deformation or burst. There will be certain colour difference after inflation, and the colour effect will be better. Please avoid sunburning, overheating, sharp object and excessive friction
description: Product Description GuassLee 36" balloons Large, giant or jumbo, any words that you can describe our 36" balloons is no wrong; GuassLee giant balloons are using much thicker and pure latex material which makes it more bouncy and durable; These giant balloons sure will be a huge hit on your party, they perfectly do what the balloons do. Giant clear balloons are widely used in wedding and photo shoot, they will not let you down! 5PCS 36 Inch Large Balloons ● Including 5pcs large balloons(uninflated), which are made of pure natural Latex material, heavy thick, durable and with no smell, definately helium black balloons ● Large balloons have inflated diameter 36", and uninflated size 13"x 8.27" WIDELY USED BLACK BALLOONS These giant black balloons make excellent decorations for a variety of parties and events like birthday/wedding decoration, baby shower, bridal shower, Thanksgiving day decorations, Christmas decorations, etc; they are also perfect for photo shoot Try GuassLee balloons for your party, wedding, birthday, festivals decorations! Wedding Decoration Birthday Decoration Party Decoration Perfect as photo prop
